title: Forry
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Forry
CT-44/444 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|I|290|Forry}} |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Forry''', designated '''CT-44/444''', was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] who served in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Ord Cestus Squad]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He specialized in physical training. Along with his fellow [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] commandos [[Seefor]] and [[Sirty]], Forry attempted to stop [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha ARC]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jangotat|Nate]] from violating their code, which Nate was doing by not following the instructions that [[Jedi General/Legends|Generals]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Kenobi]] and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Fisto]] gave them. When Nate tried to leave, Forry and Nate squared off. Nate won by landing a blow on Forry's jaw. Forry helped Fisto and Nate train the commandos of the [[Desert Wind]] terrorist group. He was among the survivors who managed to escape their lair when [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] sent a group of [[Assassin droid/Legends|infiltration droids]] to destroy them. When Nate's body was not recovered, they feared that Nate had been [[Death/Legends|killed]] or that he had broken the Code and betrayed them. ==Appearances== *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}} *[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-44/444 |es=CT-44/444 }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
